finding: Increased Pulmonary Blood Flow without Cyanosis

differentials.name: WITH LEFT ATRIAL ENLARGEMENT indicates shunt distal to mitral valve = increased volume without escape defect
differentials.raw: WITH LEFT ATRIAL ENLARGEMENT indicates shunt distal to mitral valve = increased volume without escape defect

differentials.name: VSD (25%): small aorta in intracardiac shunt
differentials.raw: VSD (25%): small aorta in intracardiac shunt

differentials.name: PDA (12%): aorta + pulmonary artery of equal size in extracardiac shunt
differentials.raw: PDA (12%): aorta + pulmonary artery of equal size in extracardiac shunt

differentials.name: WITH NORMAL LEFT ATRIUM indicates shunt proximal to mitral valve = volume increased with escape mechanism through defect
differentials.raw: WITH NORMAL LEFT ATRIUM indicates shunt proximal to mitral valve = volume increased with escape mechanism through defect

differentials.name: Partial anomalous pulmonary venous return (PAPVR) + sinus venosus ASD
differentials.raw: Partial anomalous pulmonary venous return (PAPVR) + sinus venosus ASD

context: =  indicates L-R shunt with increased pulmonary blood flow (shunt volume > 40%)
